description: The 112-one matrix and the arithmetic elimination of 12 of the 25 feasible 113-one degree profiles are verified. The remaining 13 profiles require a complete, replayable proof family. No final SAT manifest or replay audit is checked into this publication boundary, so the proposed equality is not an established theorem here.

historical_untraced_session.summary: The original sweep reported every capacity-feasible profile UNSAT or arithmetically filtered, but retained no proof traces. None of those solver verdicts is load-bearing.

publication_consequence.pending_dependency: A complete replayable refutation of all 13 surviving 113-one profiles would establish Z(10,23)=112; vertex deletion would then give Z(11,23)<=123, matching its checked witness.
